title: Crafts Illusions
summary: You fashion images from light that are so perfect they seem real.
tiers: Tier 3: Cast Illusion or Major Illusion
Tier 6: Grandiose Illusion or Permanent Illusion
gm_intrusions: The illusion isn’t believable. The illusion is pierced at just the wrong moment.
text: You fashion images from light that are so perfect they seem real.
details: You fashion images from light that are so perfect they seem real.
